yield_calculation_method: reported Eq. (1); w_cat is catalyst before growth and w_tot is catalyst plus carbon after growth
yield_unit_standardized: % carbon weight gain relative to catalyst
yield_standardization_note: Reported value transcribed without conversion to purified CNT mass.
CNT_type_evidence: SEM and TEM show thick CNTs, carbon fibers, narrow CNTs and a mixed t-MWCNT/MWCNT product.
SWCNT_evidence_summary: No SWCNT assignment; multi-wall structures and carbon fibers are visible by TEM/HRTEM.
morphology: non-uniform mixture of thick CNTs, carbon fibers and some t-MWCNTs
evidence_text: Table 1 reports 73% weight-gain yield and 43% TGA carbon; microscopy confirms a mixed, non-uniform product.
notes: 43% is TGA carbon content, not separately quantified residual-metal or application-grade purity. Diameter and length distributions were not reported.

yield_calculation_method: reported Eq. (1); w_cat is catalyst before growth and w_tot is catalyst plus carbon after growth
yield_unit_standardized: % carbon weight gain relative to catalyst
yield_standardization_note: Reported value transcribed without conversion to purified CNT mass.
CNT_type_evidence: TEM/HRTEM shows resolved 4-7 graphene walls and uniform 4-8 nm outer diameters.
SWCNT_evidence_summary: HRTEM wall count confirms multi-walled rather than single-walled tubes.
morphology: uniform, entangled t-MWCNTs; isolated tubes and bundles; clean surfaces
amorphous_carbon_level: low; slight surface deposits noted by HRTEM
evidence_text: Table 1 reports 452% weight-gain yield and 85% TGA carbon; HRTEM gives 4-8 nm diameter and 4-7 walls.
notes: More than 95% of measured tubes were in the 4-8 nm range; length and residual metal were not reported.
